message:
feat(airtable): multi-auth provisioning automation with doctor and self-check; Stripe test additions

Airtable connector — full provisioning automation:
- AirtableAuth enum (Token/CredentialId) with redacted_label() and
  is_secretless() for safe diagnostics
- AirtableConfig::from_params with strict mutual exclusivity validation
  (exactly one of token or credential_id required)
- apply_auth() per-request header injection replacing hardcoded bearer
- health_check() via whoami endpoint, full Doctor implementation with
  configuration, auth_mode, and network_constraints checks
- handle_self_check() returning SelfCheckReport with degraded state
  for credential_id mode
- Wire up "doctor" and "self_check" message dispatch in main.rs

Stripe connector — minor additions:
- Formatting refinements in connector.rs
- New integration tests for payment intent lifecycle operations

S3 connector — minor formatting fix in client.rs

Update beads issue tracker with status changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,6 +97,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut AirtableConnector, message: &str) -> ser
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
